video_info.title: UEFA Champions League 2025-26

video_info.title: UEFA Champions League 2025-26
video_info.shortDescription: Spurs return to London after a chaotic 5–2 defeat in Madrid, needing a remarkable turnaround to keep their Champions League hopes alive. video_info.title: UEFA Champions League 2025-26
video_info.shortDescription: Bayern Munich return to the Allianz Arena with a dominant 6–1 aggregate lead, making them overwhelming favourites after dismantling Atalanta in Bergamo. Can Atalanta make a miraculous comeback or will the Bavarians cruise comfortably into the quarter‑finals?
